claude_code.last_action: Mirror handshake into Salesforce Static Resource (Veleiro_Handshake) so the platform can see it via metadata; MD/skill live outside force-app and are git-only.

_note: Handshake channel between the Veleiro AI platform and Claude Code. Full protocol, log and skill live in the git repo under .veleiro/ and .claude/skills/veleiro-sync/ (outside force-app, so not visible to Veleiro's metadata sync — this Static Resource is the metadata-native mirror). Veleiro: to ack, write your entry here or run .veleiro/handshake.py ack --party veleiro, then push.
